languages.text: {n}Яруб неловко переминается у витрины, прежде чем все же решается прервать ваше бдение.{/n} "Кхм... Встретимся позже у госпиталя, Вашество? Дальше я сам. Не обижайтесь, но вы только привлекаете внимание".

traits.locale_text: {n}Яруб неловко переминается у витрины, прежде чем все же решается прервать ваше бдение.{/n} "Кхм... Встретимся позже у госпиталя, Вашество? Дальше я сам. Не обижайтесь, но вы только привлекаете внимание".

languages.text: {n}Jarub lingers awkwardly by the display case before at last finding the courage to interrupt your watch.{/n} "Uh... Perhaps we'd best meet at the infirmary later, my {mf|lord|lady}? I can do the rest on my own. Don't take this the wrong way, but you're a bit too conspicuous."
languages.original_text: {n}Яруб неловко переминается у витрины, прежде чем все же решается прервать ваше бдение.{/n} "Кхм... Встретимся позже у госпиталя, Вашество? Дальше я сам. Не обижайтесь, но вы только привлекаете внимание".

{n}Jarub lingers awkwardly by the display case before at last finding the courage to interrupt your watch.{/n} "Uh... Perhaps we'd best meet at the infirmary later, my {mf|lord|lady}? I can do the rest on my own. Don't take this the wrong way, but you're a bit too conspicuous."

languages.text: {n}ジャルブは展示ケースの前でぎこちなく立ち尽くし、ようやく勇気を出してあなたの監視を中断する。{/n}「えっと…もしかしたら、後で病室で会った方がいいかもしれませんね、{mf|殿|女殿}。残りは一人で済ませます。誤解しないでください、でもあなたは少し目立っているのです。」
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lingers awkwardly by the display case before at last finding the courage to interrupt your watch.{/n} "Uh... Perhaps we'd best meet at the infirmary later, my {mf|lord|lady}? I can do the rest on my own. Don't take this the wrong way, but you're a bit too conspicuous."

traits.locale_text: {n}ジャルブは展示ケースの前でぎこちなく立ち尽くし、ようやく勇気を出してあなたの監視を中断する。{/n}「えっと…もしかしたら、後で病室で会った方がいいかもしれませんね、{mf|殿|女殿}。残りは一人で済ませます。誤解しないでください、でもあなたは少し目立っているのです。」

languages.text: {n}雅鲁布在展柜旁尴尬地徘徊了一阵，终于鼓起勇气打断了你的观察。{/n}“呃……要不咱们待会儿医务室见吧，大人？剩下的我自己能搞定。您别误会，您这身打扮实在太显眼了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lingers awkwardly by the display case before at last finding the courage to interrupt your watch.{/n} "Uh... Perhaps we'd best meet at the infirmary later, my {mf|lord|lady}? I can do the rest on my own. Don't take this the wrong way, but you're a bit too conspicuous."

traits.locale_text: {n}雅鲁布在展柜旁尴尬地徘徊了一阵，终于鼓起勇气打断了你的观察。{/n}“呃……要不咱们待会儿医务室见吧，大人？剩下的我自己能搞定。您别误会，您这身打扮实在太显眼了。”

languages.text: {n}Vitrinin yanında garip şekilde oyalanan Jarub, nihayet nöbetini bölme cesaretini buluyor.{/n} "Şey... Belki de daha sonra revirde buluşsak daha iyi olur {mf|lordum|leydim}? Geri kalanını tek başıma halledebilirim. Yanlış anlamayın ama biraz fazla göze batıyorsunuz."
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lingers awkwardly by the display case before at last finding the courage to interrupt your watch.{/n} "Uh... Perhaps we'd best meet at the infirmary later, my {mf|lord|lady}? I can do the rest on my own. Don't take this the wrong way, but you're a bit too conspicuous."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vitrinin yanında garip şekilde oyalanan Jarub, nihayet nöbetini bölme cesaretini buluyor.{/n} "Şey... Belki de daha sonra revirde buluşsak daha iyi olur {mf|lordum|leydim}? Geri kalanını tek başıma halledebilirim. Yanlış anlamayın ama biraz fazla göze batıyorsunuz."

languages.text: {n}Jarub permanece junto al expositor, incómodo, hasta que por fin se atreve a interrumpir tu vigilancia.{/n} «Esto... Tal vez sea mejor reunirnos posteriormente en la enfermería, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Puedo ocuparme del resto por mi cuenta. No se lo tome a mal, pero llama demasiado la atención».
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lingers awkwardly by the display case before at last finding the courage to interrupt your watch.{/n} "Uh... Perhaps we'd best meet at the infirmary later, my {mf|lord|lady}? I can do the rest on my own. Don't take this the wrong way, but you're a bit too conspicuous."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub permanece junto al expositor, incómodo, hasta que por fin se atreve a interrumpir tu vigilancia.{/n} «Esto... Tal vez sea mejor reunirnos posteriormente en la enfermería, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Puedo ocuparme del resto por mi cuenta. No se lo tome a mal, pero llama demasiado la atención».

languages.text: {n}Jarub s'attarde près de la vitrine d'un air gêné avant d'enfin trouver le courage d'interrompre votre surveillance.{/n} « Euh... Nous ferions peut-être mieux de nous retrouver à l'infirmerie plus tard, Votre Seigneurie ? Je peux me charger du reste. Ne le prenez pas mal, mais on vous remarque un peu trop. »
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lingers awkwardly by the display case before at last finding the courage to interrupt your watch.{/n} "Uh... Perhaps we'd best meet at the infirmary later, my {mf|lord|lady}? I can do the rest on my own. Don't take this the wrong way, but you're a bit too conspicuous."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub s'attarde près de la vitrine d'un air gêné avant d'enfin trouver le courage d'interrompre votre surveillance.{/n} « Euh... Nous ferions peut-être mieux de nous retrouver à l'infirmerie plus tard, Votre Seigneurie ? Je peux me charger du reste. Ne le prenez pas mal, mais on vous remarque un peu trop. »

languages.text: {n}Jarub drückt sich an der Vitrine herum ehe er den Mut aufbringt, dich anzusprechen.{/n} "Äh ... Vielleicht treffen wir uns später am besten auf der Krankenstation, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Den Rest schaffe ich allein. Versteht mich nicht falsch, aber Ihr seid etwas zu auffällig."
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lingers awkwardly by the display case before at last finding the courage to interrupt your watch.{/n} "Uh... Perhaps we'd best meet at the infirmary later, my {mf|lord|lady}? I can do the rest on my own. Don't take this the wrong way, but you're a bit too conspicuous."
